feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Television as World Model Installation
entry.content: What if we could extract the world model that television installs in its viewers? Some thoughts on media, world models, cultivation theory, and culture.
entry.summary: What if we could extract the world model that television installs in its viewers?
